description: Refactor removed the db.transaction wrapper and the findByIdForUpdate row lock, introducing a race condition. Two concurrent refunds for the same order can both pass the remainingRefundable check. The gateway call and DB writes are also no longer atomic — partial failures leave inconsistent state.

issues.summary: Race condition: db.transaction + SELECT FOR UPDATE was removed; two concurrent refunds can both read the same refundedAmount and over-refund.
Lost atomicity: gateway refund + order update + refund record are no longer in a transaction. A failure after gateway.refund() leaves money refunded with no DB record.
bulkRefund serial loop with no rate limit and no transaction — replaces prior Promise.all, but still loads each order a second time unnecessarily (already loaded inside processRefund).
